tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Artist: Ke$ha
Song: Take it Off

[tab]Chords Used:
   [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]C#m[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]Fm[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]Gm[/ch]
e|--2--|--3--|--4--|--5--|--2--|--5--|--3--|
B|--3--|--3--|--5--|--5--|--2--|--5--|--3--|
G|--4--|--4--|--6--|--6--|--2--|--5--|--3--|
D|--4--|--5--|--6--|--7--|--4--|--7--|--5--|
A|--2--|--5--|--4--|--7--|--4--|--7--|--5--|
E|-----|--3--|--4--|--5--|--2--|--5--|--3--|[/tab]

palm mute to replicate that techno effect of the song


[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
When the Dark of the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]
Comes around, Then it's time[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
That the animal comes alive[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
Looking for,something wild[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                        
And now we lookin' like pimps[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]     
In my gold Trans-Am.[/tab]

[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]
In my handbag.[/tab]

[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]
I'll regret it in the mornin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]
But tonight[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
I don't give a[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C#m[/ch]
I don't give a[/tab]

[tab]       [ch]Bm[/ch]
There's a place downtown,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
Where the freaks all come around.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]

[tab]        [ch]Fm[/ch]

[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]
When they Take It Off.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Gm[/ch]
Everybody Take It Off.[/tab]

The chords are basically the same for the rest of the song.
